name: Largo
description: You hear that? It's time to start the show.

abilities.name: Encore
abilities.description: Whenever Largo applies a unit-targeted buff to an allied hero, he also applies the buff to self. Doubletap applies the buff to the nearest allied hero within the cast range of the unit-targeted ability.

abilities.name: Catchy Lick
abilities.description: Pulls the targeted unit a short distance, and applies a basic dispel. Buff or debuffs dispelled from the targeted unit grants self health regeneration bonus. Deals damage to the pulled unit-targeted enemy. Has a lesser pull distance on enemy units.

abilities.name: Frogstomp
abilities.description: Tosses froglings to the area-targeted location. The froglings deals damage, stuns, and apply movement speed slow to all enemy units within the radius.

abilities.name: Croak of Genius
abilities.description: Spell damage applied to enemy heroes sourced to the buff-affected allied hero is reapplied as an additional magical spell damage per second.

abilities.name: Amphibian Rhapsody
abilities.description: Switches the ability bar switches to three song abilities, each with different ability effects. Largo can cast one Amphibian Rhapsody-based abilities at any given time. Gains a Groovin' stack per successful strum on beat, which grants bonus armor and reduces the mana cost of the song abilities. Largo loses a Groovin' stack whenever he misses a beat. Self-disarms upon casting any song abilities.
